title: Seattle - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Seattle - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Khoury College in Seattle
A city of industry titans and innovative startups awaits you
With ready access to natural beauty and industry expertise, Northeastern University in Seattle is well-established in South Lake Union at the heart of Seattle’s thriving tech economy. It’s an immersive location for furthering your tech career, and one of America’s most sought-after places to live.
Welcome to Seattle, home of Amazon and Microsoft
Learn how Seattle is a tech magnet with opportunities at large companies and new startups.

Seattle
A place to grow professionally and personally
A relaxed atmosphere and culture that allows students to enjoy a breadth of activities, Seattle’s campus is a thriving space for startups, research, and learning. Students readily land internships at tech giants like Google, Facebook, Microsoft, Expedia, and Salesforce, in addition to startups, national labs, and more.
With faculty research in areas like machine learning, privacy, security, database performance and more, there are plenty of opportunities for student research and projects. Students are encouraged to meet and work with faculty, who are welcoming and available.

Seattle is a vibrant and interesting place to learn and explore.

Student experience: A thriving cultural hub with great public transit
Surrounded by the arts and cultural gems, the Seattle campus offers a world of theater, music, museums and more to explore while you level up your tech career. A few of the icons nearby include the Space Needle and Pacific Science Center. With easy access to public transit on a system of trams that run right by campus, it’s easy to explore the wider Seattle area.
Featuring many clubs and student organizations, Seattle boasts a “can-do” culture on campus. Drop-in spaces and study halls provide areas for engagement while sweeping campus views of Seattle and the water provide inspiration for exploration.
Study and thrive in Seattle
Join students Siyu and Stephen for a campus tour in the heart of Seattle.
Featured faculty: Tamara Bonaci
Associate teaching professor Tamara Bonaci teaches security and privacy courses at Northeastern University’s Seattle campus. Her research focuses on the security and privacy of emerging and forthcoming biomedical technologies.
